answer:
<think> The actor who was in both Gremlins (1984) and the 1985 movie could be Zach Galligan, who played the lead role in Gremlins as Billy Peltzer. To find out who directed the 1985 movie that Galligan was in, I need to look up his filmography for that year. </think>

<answer> Joe John Dante directed the 1985 movie that Zach Galligan was in. He directed the sequel to Gremlins, titled Gremlins 2: The New Batch. </answer>
